ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Alli nobili et ecc. ss. Academici compagni, et ss miei oss.
ItacWorkItem.Content: Manutio`s letters explaining the details of the Academy printing projects and costs
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
